summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements for the Elite Car Care premium website. All major frontend sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, WhyChooseUs, Gallery, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) are implemented with the correct dark/gold theme, responsive layouts, and scroll animations. The Motoko backend actor is present with submitBooking and getBookings functions. A few minor concerns exist around the backend stable memory and the Testimonials layout spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: submitBooking stores the provided booking data in stable memory
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo uses `let bookings = List.empty<Booking>()` which is a non-stable variable. Stable memory persistence via `stable var` or equivalent is not evident. On canister upgrade, bookings would be lost.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use a horizontally scrollable carousel or a 2x2 grid layout on desktop
missing_requirements.reason: The Testimonials component uses a 3-column grid (lg:grid-cols-3) on desktop rather than the specified horizontally scrollable carousel or 2x2 grid layout.

hallucinated_features.description: Gallery lightbox modal with click-to-open full-screen image view
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a gallery grid with hover overlay effects. A full lightbox/modal feature was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Hero section includes an animated statistics row (500+ Cars Detailed, 5 star Avg. Rating, 10+ Years Experience)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not specify any statistics or stats row in the Hero section.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking
hallucinated_features.reason: No attribution link or third-party branding was requested in the build spec.
